member.name: T:TransactionReceiptQuery
member.summary:
Get the receipt of a transaction, given its transaction ID.

Once a transaction reaches consensus, then information about whether it succeeded or failed will be available until the end of the receipt period.

This query is free.

member.name: M:TransactionReceiptQuery.MapReceiptList(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Proto.TransactionReceipt})
member.summary: Create a list of transaction receipts from a protobuf.

member.name: P:TransactionReceiptQuery.TransactionId
member.summary: Set the ID of the transaction for which the receipt is being requested.

member.name: P:TransactionReceiptQuery.IncludeChildren
member.summary: Whether the response should include the records of any child transactions spawned by the top-level transaction with the given transactionID.
member.param: The value that includeChildren should be set to; true to include children, false to exclude

member.name: P:TransactionReceiptQuery.IncludeDuplicates
member.summary: Whether records of processing duplicate transactions should be returned along with the record of processing the first consensus transaction with the given id whose status was neither INVALID_NODE_ACCOUNT nor INVALID_PAYER_SIGNATURE or, if no such record exists, the record of processing the first transaction to reach consensus with the given transaction id.
